pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates file at this exact path with 6 chemicals: Muriatic Acid, Caustic Soda, Wood Alcohol, MEK, Oil of Vitriol, Dry Ice
export_result.sh line 22 and verifier.py line 54 both reference this exact path
verifier.py line 89 validates these exact column names (with fuzzy matching)
https://www.interstatechem.com/products/muriatic-acid and https://nj.gov/health/eoh/rtkweb/documents/fs/1012.pdf confirm CAS 7647-01-0 for hydrochloric acid (muriatic acid)
Multiple SDS documents and chemical safety references confirm UN 1789 for muriatic acid
https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/9073 (SODIUM HYDROXIDE, SOLID) and https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/1499 (SODIUM HYDROXIDE SOLUTION) both list CAS 1310-73-2

https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/9073 lists UN 1823 for SODIUM HYDROXIDE, SOLID (Caustic soda, solid). Note: UN 1824 applies to SODIUM HYDROXIDE SOLUTION per https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/1499. The metadata value corresponds to the solid form.
https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/3874 and https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/compound/Methanol confirm CAS 67-56-1 for methanol (wood alcohol)
https://nj.gov/health/eoh/rtkweb/documents/fs/1222.pdf and https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/3874 confirm UN 1230 for methanol (wood alcohol)
https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/1105 and https://nj.gov/health/eoh/rtkweb/documents/fs/1258.pdf confirm CAS 78-93-3 for methyl ethyl ketone (MEK)
https://nj.gov/health/eoh/rtkweb/documents/fs/1258.pdf explicitly states 'DOT Number: UN 1193' for MEK. Also confirmed by https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/1105
https://webbook.nist.gov/cgi/cbook.cgi?ID=7664-93-9 and https://nap.nationalacademies.org/read/159/chapter/37 confirm CAS 7664-93-9 for sulfuric acid (oil of vitriol)

https://nj.gov/health/eoh/rtkweb/documents/fs/1761.pdf and web search results confirm UN 1830 for sulfuric acid, >51% (concentrated). Note: UN 2796 applies to dilute sulfuric acid (≤51%) and UN 1831 applies to fuming sulfuric acid.
https://webbook.nist.gov/cgi/cbook.cgi?ID=C124389 and multiple SDS documents confirm CAS 124-38-9 for carbon dioxide (dry ice)
https://www.hazmattool.com/info.php?language=en&a=Carbon+dioxide,+solid+or+Dry+ice&b=UN1845&c=9 confirms UN 1845 for carbon dioxide, solid (dry ice)

privileged_info_summary: This task requires agents to standardize a legacy chemical inventory using the CAMEO Chemicals website. The input file contains 6 chemical names: Muriatic Acid, Caustic Soda, Wood Alcohol, MEK, Oil of Vitriol, and Dry Ice. All ground truth data has been verified against authoritative sources (CAMEO Chemicals NOAA, NIST, CDC, EPA, state health department fact sheets). All CAS numbers are correct: Muriatic Acid (7647-01-0), Caustic Soda (1310-73-2), Wood Alcohol (67-56-1), MEK (78-93-3), Oil of Vitriol (7664-93-9), Dry Ice (124-38-9). All UN numbers are correct: 1789, 1823 (solid sodium hydroxide), 1230, 1193, 1830 (concentrated sulfuric acid), and 1845. The expected output is a CSV with 4 columns: Input Name, Standard Name, CAS Number, UN Number.
